revision.comment: provide an internal link while dispenser's tool is unavailable
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:All articles with links needing disambiguation]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23931424921|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#if:{{{1|}}} |[[{{{1}}}|{{ #if:{{{2|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{1}}} }}]]  }}{{Fix |name=Disambiguation needed |link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation/Fixing links |text=disambiguation needed |title=Link needs disambiguation |date={{{date|}}} |cat-date=Category:Articles with links needing disambiguation |cat= }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] \n \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation_needed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#if:{{{1|}}} |[[{{{1}}}|{{ #if:{{{2|}}} | {{{2|}}} | {{{1}}} }}]]  }}{{Fix |name=Disambiguation needed |link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Disambiguation/Fixing links |text=disambiguation needed |title=Link needs disambiguation |date={{{date|}}} |cat-date=Category:Articles with links needing disambiguation |cat= }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] \n \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
